title: Missing Admin Authorization
vulnerable_behavior: A normal user can access the admin panel in the vulnerable app after logging in.
secure_behavior: The secure app blocks the same normal user from accessing the admin panel and returns 403 Forbidden.
evidence_note: Compare the /admin route behavior after logging in as alice on both apps.
root_cause: The vulnerable app only checks whether a user is logged in, but does not check whether the user has the admin role.
impact: A normal user may access administrative functionality or sensitive user information.
remediation: Enforce role-based authorization on the backend before rendering admin functionality.
retest_notes: Retest confirmed that the secure app blocks non-admin users.
